text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism that dynamically adjusts based on recent user interactions and criticality. This ensures the agent focuses on the most relevant and impactful tasks, preventing the accumulation of noise and improving efficiency. The new implementation will be integrated into the Karpathy AutoResearch loop, enhancing the agent's ability to refine its own plan based on immediate feedback and evolving priorities.
reason: This addition addresses a recent critical flaw (WinError 10054) by introducing a more adaptive and context-aware importance scoring system. It aligns with the existing importance scoring but with real-time adjustments, making the agent more responsive to current needs and reducing the overhead of manual prioritization adjustments.
